{{CargoOrgan
|name=Licker's Tongue
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10813
|idx=14
|description="Fused with human and frog genes, Zombie Lickers can move swiftly even without sight. They hunt with their long tongues!"
—BSAA Report
|skill=
|hp=942
|def=95
|atk=157
|rush=71
|gene1=When in Zombie Form:
> Gain +2% Evo Chests in explorations
|gene2=Earth RES +30
|gene3=During exploration, ignore enemy DEF +100
|gene7=When in Zombie Form:
> Gain +2% Evo Chests in explorations (Awakened)
|}}
